name: sport-education-pedagogy
description: Sport Education model and physical education pedagogy. Covers Siedentop's Sport Education model (seasons, affiliation, formal competition, record-keeping, festivity, culminating event), unit and lesson design for PE, grouping strategies, assessment frameworks, and the shift from "teaching activities" to "teaching sport as an authentic practice." Use when designing PE unit plans, transforming a traditional activity-of-the-week approach into a durable educational program, or aligning assessment with educational intent.
